evidence.correctness_and_freshness: docs_unavailable=true; LONG-TAIL handling. Playbook is internally consistent: pcm_24000 query param matches AudioContext sampleRate=24000, Int16 little-endian decode is standard for ElevenLabs PCM, stream-input endpoint and xi_api_key init message match known patterns. Model eleven_turbo_v2_5 and voice ID are plausible. No version date claimed → score 4 per long-tail rule.
evidence.executability: FastAPI and React blocks are syntactically valid. Backend uses websockets + asyncio.gather correctly. Frontend correctly initializes AudioContext on user gesture. Minor: receive_text loop has no explicit break on disconnect besides exception, and asyncio.gather may not cleanly cancel sibling task — non-trivial but runnable. No sandbox-infeasible patterns (no ngrok/brew/sudo).
evidence.completeness: (a) API key acquisition with URL+menu path ✓; (b) pip and npx install bash blocks ✓; (c) .env template with ELEVENLABS_API_KEY matching code reference ✓; (d) backend main.py ✓; (e) frontend App.js ✓; (f) uvicorn + npm start test commands ✓. All six pieces present.
evidence.citation_anchoring: Inline [1] and [2] markers appear but no actual URLs are provided for them. No links to elevenlabs.io/docs. Only the elevenlabs.io homepage is linked (for signup), which is not the docs domain. No official docs URL cited.

rubric_notes: Citation markers [1][2] without resolvable URLs are filler. Long-tail handling applied for correctness.
